x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR case short descriptions are the primary NLP input for Now Assist HRSD classification and routing. Vague or templated short descriptions produce poor AI routing accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Train HR case creators to write specific, descriptive short descriptions. Add guidance text to the HR case creation form. Target: ≤5% of closed HR cases missing short descriptions in the trailing 12 months.
